Have more questions?
View other FAQs on
Community Forum
General
How do I get started?
To get started, create a Web3Auth Developer Dashboard account and select a plan. Check
here
for more details.
How is Monthly Active Wallet (MAW) calculated?
An Monthly Active Wallet (MAW) represents a user who logs in or has an active session at least once in a given calendar month,
                regardless of the number of times a user logs in during that month.
‍
Do you offer a trial for the features before I buy a plan?
Yes, you can utilize our Devnet environment to fully test all the features before deciding to go live.
‍
What's Web3Auth's uptime and status?
You can check our services uptime and status
here
.
What kind of support will I receive?
We have an active
community forum
available for anyone
                integrating Web3Auth. Growth and Scale plans users will receive prioritized support within our community portal where the users will
                be added to respective subscription plans.
If you happened to have a unique use case that requires access to our technical team or requires higher levels of support with
                committed shorter response times, please
get in touch
with us for enterprise
                support.
Are there specific programs with special pricing or incentives for Startups?
Web3Auth has partnered with several infrastructure providers to offer credits to eligible startups to help you kickstart your product
                launches. Apply for the Web3Auth Bootstrapping Program
here
.
BILLING
How do I sign up for Growth or Scale plan?
You can enroll in the Growth or Scale plan straight from the developer dashboard. Just enter the required information when prompted,
                and your upgrade will be instantly applied.
What happens if I surpass the free MAWs included in my subscription?
Your users will still be able to login even after you exceed the free MAW included in your subscription. Once you reach the free MAW
                threshold, the additional MAW fee will apply. For example, if an app on Growth plan has 5,000 MAWs, the first 3000 MAWs will be
                included as part of the Growth plan subscription. For the remaining 2,000 MAWs, the app will be charged $90 (=2,000 X $0.045). This
                detail will be shown in the invoice under
Dashboard Settings > Plan & Billing
.
Can I switch to a different plan anytime?
Yes, you can change your plan at any time. Note that we don't provide prorated refunds for downgrades or cancellations, for
                example, if you downgrade or cancel before the end of your billing period, you still pay for the remainder of the billing period and
                you will continue to receive the service.
What is the billing cycle?
On the first day of each month, an invoice is issued that includes the subscription fee for the forthcoming month and the cumulative
                number of MAWs from the last month.
Who has access to the payment information?
Only team owners and/or the team member with billing role (limited to one member from a team at any time) are able to view or edit the
                billing information.
How can I check my current usage and billing charges?
You can track your usage on the developer dashboard at
Dashboard Billing > Payment
.
Which payment methods do you accept?
We accept online payments through Visa, MasterCard, and American Express.
How are SMS surcharges calculated?
The first 100 SMS per month are free of cost. After your first 100 SMS logins, a market rate surcharge will be applied to each SMS
                sent. Please
refer to this document
to see the surcharges based on region. To enable SMS login, you will be required to provide your payment details and you will be
                billed at the end of each month based on usag

Introduction
Web3Auth Documentation
Pluggable embedded wallet infrastructure that simplifies web3 wallet integration
​
What is Web3Auth (MetaMask Embedded Wallets)?
MetaMask Embedded Wallets (formerly Web3Auth) is a pluggable embedded wallet infrastructure that simplifies Web3 wallet integration and user onboarding. It supports OAuth-based logins and multiple platforms, allowing users to access Web3 applications through familiar authentication methods in under a minute.
Users enjoy seamless onboarding while maintaining full control of their non-custodial wallets, ensuring both convenience and security.
Explore our SDKs
Web SDKs
Integrate Web3Auth in just 4 lines of code.
Mobile & Gaming SDKs
Native mobile & gaming authentication with no web3 expertise required.
Backend SDKs
Seamless integration of Web3 authentication into backend applications, AI agents, and programmatic use cases.
Looking for a more customised solution?
Explore our Enterprise offering and build and manage your version of Web3Auth.
Find out More
Resources
​
Our comprehensive array of guides, reference materials, and examples is designed to assist you at
every step of your Web3Auth integration. Explore the nuances of web3 authentication and craft a
tailored integration that meets your specific needs.
Quick Start
Create an integration from scratch within seconds.
Authentication
Configure authentication providers for secure Web3Auth integration.
Connect any blockchain
Step-by-step guides for integrating Web3Auth with different blockchains.
Infrastructure
Learn about Web3Auth's infrastructure architecture and setup.
Community Forum
Join our community to get help with Web3Auth Integrations.

hits.title: Binance Chain Extension Wallet Removes Seedphrases with Web3Auth
Show HN: M3S – Modular Web3 Adapter framework to end provider lockin issues
Provide seamless user logins for both mainstream and Web3.0 users
KeePassXC pull request to add basic support for WebAuthn
W3C approves WebAuthn as the web standard for password-free logins
Cloudflare’s CAPTCHA replacement with FIDO2/WebAuthn is a bad idea
GitHub Supports Web Authentication (WebAuthn) for Security Keys

analysis.name: Web3Auth
analysis.tagline: Build for Conversion, Scale for your Ambition
analysis.value_proposition: Embedded wallet infrastructure using MPC and Account Abstraction that lets users onboard via social logins in under a second without seed phrases.
analysis.ideal_customer: Web3 app developers and enterprises needing non-custodial wallet onboarding without burdening end users with seed phrases or crypto-native UX

features.name: plug n play sdk
features.description: Pre-built, drop-in wallet modal and authentication flow configurable in ~4 lines of code
features.evidence_quote: Integrate Web3Auth in just 4 lines of code.

features.name: core kit sdk
features.description: Low-level SDK for fully custom and whitelabeled wallet integration without pre-built UI
features.evidence_quote: Customize and Whitelabel (Core Kit)

features.name: social logins
features.description: Onboard users via Google, X (Twitter), Email, and other OAuth providers without seed phrases
features.evidence_quote: Email, SMS, Wallet, Passkeys, and Social Logins

features.name: email login
features.description: Passwordless email-based wallet creation and authentication
features.evidence_quote: Email, SMS, Wallet, and Social Logins

features.name: sms otp
features.description: SMS one-time password for authentication and/or MFA; first 100 SMS free then market rates
features.evidence_quote: First 100 SMS free, market rates will apply thereafter. Allow users to use SMS OTP for authentication and/or MFA.

features.name: passkeys
features.description: Device-based passkey login for wallet creation and authentication
features.evidence_quote: Allow users to create wallets and login with their device Passkeys

features.name: multi-party computation (mpc)
features.description: Threshold signature scheme (TSS) splitting key shares so no single party holds the full private key
features.evidence_quote: Wallet creation in seconds - all while keeping it secure, non-custodial, and seed phrase-free via Multi-Party Computation (MPC)

features.name: mpc tss web and mobile
features.description: Full MPC TSS key management support for both web and native mobile platforms
features.evidence_quote: MPC TSS Support for Web and Mobile

features.name: account abstraction
features.description: Native smart account creation enabling gasless transactions and programmable wallet logic
features.evidence_quote: Use Web3Auth's native Account Abstraction SDKs for easier integrations

features.name: account abstraction sdk compatibility
features.description: Works with any third-party Account Abstraction SDK alongside Web3Auth
features.evidence_quote: Use any Account Abstraction SDK along with Web3Auth

features.name: multi-factor authentication
features.description: Customizable MFA adding an extra security layer on top of the primary login method
features.evidence_quote: Add an extra layer of security through customizable MFA

features.name: advanced mfa methods
features.description: Enterprise-grade MFA options beyond standard methods
features.evidence_quote: Advanced MFA methods

features.name: custom authentication
features.description: Integrate existing auth providers (Firebase, Auth0, Cognito) or any JWT-based identity provider
features.evidence_quote: Use third party Auth providers e.g. Firebase, Cognitor, Auth0 or your own JWT

features.name: custom social login provider
features.description: Integrate proprietary or custom social login providers beyond default Web3Auth providers
features.evidence_quote: Integrate with your own social login providers with Web3Auth

features.name: whitelabel login ui
features.description: Fully branded login modal and auth screens removing Web3Auth branding
features.evidence_quote: Whitelabeled Login UI

features.name: fully customizable login experience
features.description: Enterprise-level complete control over every aspect of the authentication UI and flow
features.evidence_quote: Fully Customizable Login Experience

features.name: customizable modal
features.description: Basic modal customization available on the free tier
features.evidence_quote: Customizable Modal

features.name: wallet pregeneration
features.description: Pre-create wallets for users before they log in; send tokens directly to email or social accounts
features.evidence_quote: Send tokens directly to users' emails/social accounts

features.name: wallet ui
features.description: Ready-to-deploy pre-built wallet interface screens saving frontend development time
features.evidence_quote: Save time with ready-to-deploy screens

features.name: wallet services
features.description: Post-authentication suite including wallet UI, on-ramp, and NFT checkout
features.evidence_quote: Wallet Services and Ecosystems Tools

features.name: fiat on-ramp aggregator
features.description: Aggregates 100+ local payment methods for users to purchase crypto directly in-app
features.evidence_quote: Over 100 local payment methods

features.name: nft checkout
features.description: Simplified NFT minting and purchase checkout flow for end users
features.evidence_quote: Simplify minting and a hassle-free checkout for your users

features.name: nft minting
features.description: Infrastructure for minting NFTs integrated into the wallet flow
features.evidence_quote: NFT Minting

features.name: server-side verification
features.description: Backend verification of user authentication and wallet ownership for server-gated access
features.evidence_quote: Server-Side Verification

features.name: telegram mini app login
features.description: End-to-end wallet creation within Telegram Mini Apps using Telegram account identity
features.evidence_quote: Allow users to create their wallet directly with their Telegram account within a Telegram Mini app

features.name: third-party wallet connectors
features.description: External wallet aggregator connecting MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, and other external wallets
features.evidence_quote: External Wallet Aggregator

features.name: blockchain agnostic support
features.description: Chain-agnostic architecture supporting EVM, Solana, Bitcoin, SUI, Aptos, TON, NEAR, Starknet, and more
features.evidence_quote: Chain-agnostic support with all existing blockchains

features.name: account dashboard
features.description: User-facing dashboard for managing wallet, sessions, and account settings
features.evidence_quote: User Account Dashboard

features.name: session management
features.description: Persistent and configurable session handling across devices and logins
features.evidence_quote: Session Management

features.name: custom domains
features.description: Host authentication on custom domains for fully branded enterprise deployments
features.evidence_quote: Third-party Authentication Support and Custom Domains

features.name: uptime sla
features.description: Contractual uptime SLA commitment for enterprise customers
features.evidence_quote: Uptime SLA Commitment

features.name: dedicated technical support
features.description: Named support with committed response times for enterprise accounts
features.evidence_quote: Dedicated Technical Support + Committed Response Times

features.name: react sdk
features.description: React hooks and TypeScript SDK for web integration
features.evidence_quote: Effortless integration with modern React Hooks and TypeScript support

features.name: vue sdk
features.description: Vue composables SDK for flexible web integration
features.evidence_quote: Built with Vue composables for flexible and reusable logic in your apps

features.name: javascript sdk
features.description: Framework-agnostic JS SDK for any frontend library
features.evidence_quote: Integrate easily with any frontend library or framework using plain JavaScript

features.name: android sdk
features.description: Native Android SDK for mobile wallet integration
features.evidence_quote: Seamless Android integration with full Web3Auth features.

features.name: ios sdk
features.description: Native iOS SDK for mobile wallet integration
features.evidence_quote: Seamless iOS integration with full Web3Auth features.

features.name: react native sdk
features.description: Cross-platform React Native SDK for mobile apps
features.evidence_quote: Seamless React Native integration with full Web3Auth features.

features.name: flutter sdk
features.description: Flutter SDK for cross-platform mobile wallet integration
features.evidence_quote: Seamless Flutter integration with full Web3Auth features.

features.name: unity sdk
features.description: Unity game engine SDK for Web3 authentication in games
features.evidence_quote: Seamless Unity integration with full Web3Auth features.

features.name: unreal engine sdk
features.description: Unreal Engine SDK for Web3 authentication in games
features.evidence_quote: Seamless Unreal Engine integration with full Web3Auth features.

features.name: node.js backend sdk
features.description: Server-side Node.js SDK for backend authentication, key management, and AI agent use cases
features.evidence_quote: Seamless Node.js integration designed for server-side authentication and key management.

features.name: smart accounts
features.description: ERC-4337 compatible smart contract wallets for programmable transaction logic
features.evidence_quote: Smart Accounts

features.name: non-custodial key management
features.description: Users retain full control of their private keys; Web3Auth never holds custody
features.evidence_quote: Users enjoy seamless onboarding while maintaining full control of their non-custodial wallets

features.name: seed phrase elimination
features.description: Removes seed phrase requirement entirely via MPC key splitting
features.evidence_quote: seed phrase-free via Multi-Party Computation (MPC) and Account Abstraction

features.name: volume-based maw discounts
features.description: Negotiated per-MAW pricing discounts at volume for enterprise accounts
features.evidence_quote: Volume Based MAW Discounts

features.name: native mobile support
features.description: Mobile-first support for custom integrations across Android, iOS, React Native, and Flutter
features.evidence_quote: Mobile first support for custom integration

features.name: community forum support
features.description: Developer community forum for integration help and issue resolution
features.evidence_quote: Community Forum — Join our community to get help with Web3Auth Integrations.

features.name: office hours support
features.description: Biweekly live office hours (MetaMask Office Hours) for integration assistance
features.evidence_quote: Join the biweekly MetaMask Office Hours

differentiators: MPC (Multi-Party Computation) enables non-custodial, seed phrase-free wallets
2.3x more user conversions vs. traditional wallet onboarding
97% of users onboard via social login without seed phrases (customer quote)
Acquired by Consensys / MetaMask — now branded as MetaMask Embedded Wallets
Blockchain agnostic — supports every major chain including Bitcoin, EVM, Solana, SUI, TON
Supports AI agent and programmatic authentication use cases via backend SDK
Wallet pregeneration — send tokens to users before they ever log in

recent_ships.what: Acquired by Consensys Software Inc.; product rebranded as MetaMask Embedded Wallets
recent_ships.source: We're thrilled to announce that Web3Auth has been acquired by Consensys Software Inc.

praised: "Security is non-negotiable and wallets designed to be intuitive for projects was what we needed."
"97% of our new users created their wallets with social logins instead of seed phrases"
"On launch, we were able to onboard 100,000 users seamlessly."
"Web3Auth empowered us to own the end-to-end user experience and first-party data beyond NFTs"
"We brought our existing chess.com identity seamlessly to mint and create NFTs."

free_tier.limits: 1,000 MAWs/month; $0.050 per additional MAW; no passkeys, no third-party auth, no whitelabel

tiers.name: Base
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1,000 free MAWs, social/email/SMS logins, MFA, customizable modal, community support

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3,000 free MAWs, passkeys, third-party auth (JWT), whitelabel UI, native AA, community support

tiers.name: Scale
tiers.headline_inclusions: 10,000 free MAWs, customizable MFA, wallet services, pre-generated wallets, enhanced support

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Volume MAW discounts, MPC TSS, custom domains, advanced MFA, uptime SLA, dedicated support

pricing.notes: Pricing is usage-based via Monthly Active Wallets (MAW), not seat-based. One MAW = one user with at least one login/session per calendar month. Overage rates decrease with tier: $0.050 (Base) → $0.045 (Growth) → $0.040 (Scale). SMS-OTP has first 100 SMS free then market rates apply across all tiers. Enterprise gets volume-negotiated MAW pricing.
